# AsyncBasicOps Benchmark

**Test Machine:** MacBook M4 Pro

## Results

### `AsyncBasicOps/Op-GetHit_Cap-10000_Items-10000_Tasks-1`

* **Time:** 595.80 µs – 599.11 µs – 603.75 µs
* **Throughput:** 16.563 Melem/s – 16.692 Melem/s – 16.784 Melem/s
